agent_guidance.write_scope_summary: Edit the canonical Topogram source and project-owned files only; generated-owned outputs should be regenerated.

slice_manifest.note: Read must_read sections first; use reference sections only as needed; run proof commands before completing work.

summary.description: Reusable queue grid for reviewing incidents.
summary.name: Intake Grid

diagnostics: No authored accessibility obligation DSL block exists yet; use the linked terms, decision, and draft requirement as implementation guidance.
obligations: Prefer semantic role, accessible-name source, keyboard model, focus behavior, live-region need, and proof command over raw aria-* snapshots.
Treat raw aria-* attributes as generated or maintained implementation evidence, not the contract source.
accessibility.source: topo terms, decisions, draft requirements, and design-token evidence

change_targets.reason: Widget binding is the work leaf where data, action, region, and design obligations meet.

requiredGates.reason: Validate shared UI ownership, taxonomy, references, and topology.
Validate widget placement, props, events, regions, and patterns.
Inspect behavior realizations and partial bindings before code changes.
Confirm screens, regions, widgets, display fields, behavior, and design tokens are realizable by the web generator.

verification_targets.rationale: Widget changes affect every related surface, so verification should follow the widget contract closure.
